info.title: POWER Indicators API
info.description: The API allows point data requests.

get.description:
This endpoint returns a single point time series based Analysis Ready Data (ARD) response of solar and/or meteorological data derived from multiple NASA"s Earth Science Division (ESD) projects.

- This endpoint selects the closet location to the requested input latitude and longitude from the source projects grid.

parameters.name: start

schema.title: Start Time
schema.description: This is the start time for the data request formatted as YYYY.

parameters.description: This is the start time for the data request formatted as YYYY.

parameters.name: end

schema.title: End Time
schema.description: This is the end time for the data request formatted as YYYY.

parameters.description: This is the end time for the data request formatted as YYYY.

parameters.name: latitude

schema.title: Latitude Value
schema.description: This is the point latitude value.

parameters.description: This is the point latitude value.

parameters.name: longitude

schema.title: Longitude Value
schema.description: This is the point longitude value.

parameters.description: This is the point longitude value.

parameters.name: units

schema.title: User Name
schema.description: A user name for identification purposes.

parameters.description: A user name for identification purposes.

parameters.name: user

schema.title: User Name
schema.description: A user name for identification purposes.

parameters.description: A user name for identification purposes.

example.header: The POWER Indicators API failed to complete your request; please review the errors below and the POWER Docs (https://power.larc.nasa.gov/docs/).
example.messages: A list of messages of corrections needed for the API request to be valid.

example.header: The POWER Indicators API failed to complete your request due to the submission of too many requests.
example.message: The POWER Indicators API is unreachable due too many requests are being submitted. Please try again later. If the rate limiting persists, please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information to determine an appropriate solution to obtain uninterrupted access.

example.header: The POWER Indicators API failed to complete your request. A an unknown error has occurred please try again later. If the issue persists please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information.
example.message: The POWER Indicators API is unreachable due to an unknown error (Server Side Error).

example.header: The POWER Indicators API failed to complete your request. A required backend service is unavailable at the current time please try again later. If the issue persists please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information.
example.message: The name of the backend service that is unavailable.

get.description:
This endpoint returns configuration settings of the microservice.

- This includes the available data formats, time range, and more.
